name: rentals-pdf
description: Generate a PDF from a rental database

inputs.query: SELECT f.title as product, SUM(p.amount) as total, ROUND(SUM(p.amount) / COUNT(*), 2) as price, DATE_TRUNC('month', r.rental_date) AS rental_month, COUNT(*) AS quantity FROM rental r INNER JOIN inventory i ON i.inventory_id = r.inventory_id INNER JOIN film f ON f.film_id = i.film_id INNER JOIN payment p ON p.rental_id = r.rental_id GROUP BY r.inventory_id, rental_month, f.title ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;

inputs.map: { product: data.product, quantity: parseInt(data.quantity), total: parseInt(data.total), price: parseInt(data.price), rental_month: data.rental_month }
